invoice.delete.locked-message: Locked invoices cannot be deleted. Once an invoice is locked, it must remain in the system for tax audit purposes.
invoice.delete.locked-tooltip: Locked invoices cannot be deleted. The invoice must remain in the system for tax audit purposes.
invoice.delete.modal.description: We allow you to delete an invoice, but you must ensure the series number is used for another invoice. Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoice.delete.modal.gdrive-warning: This invoice has been uploaded to Google Drive. Deleting the invoice from the system will not delete it from Google Drive. If you want to delete it from Google Drive as well, you will have to do it yourself.
invoice.delete.modal.title: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

invoice.line-item.vat.label: VAT
invoice.line-item.vat.zero-note: 0 percent VAT is used for VAT-exempt services. Perhaps you are not a VAT payer and simple invoices should be enough for you? If you are not a VAT payer, indicate this in the settings.

invoice.preview.subject: Subject:
invoice.preview.additional-message.place: You can add an additional message to the email (optional)
invoice.preview.extra-file.attach: Attach extra file to this email
invoice.preview.extra-file.add-info: You can add an extra file to invoice emails in
invoice.preview.extra-file.add-info-text: You can add an extra file to invoice emails in <infoLink>email settings</infoLink>.
invoice.preview.pro-note: Pro plan users do not have the 'Sent via haiku.lt' label added to emails.
invoice.preview.pro-note.link: Learn more about the Pro plan
invoice.preview.pro-note-text: Pro plan users do not have the 'Sent via haiku.lt' label added to emails. <infoLink>Learn more about the Pro plan</infoLink>
invoice.preview.tip.text: You can change email colors in
invoice.preview.tip-text: Tip: You can change email colors in brand settings and email template in email settings.
invoice.send.info.with-email: You can send the invoice by clicking this button. The email will be sent to "{email}". The invoice will be sent from your email address using an email template, which you can change in
invoice.send.info.with-email-text: You can send the invoice by clicking this button. The email will be sent to "{email}". The invoice will be sent from your email address using an email template, which you can change in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>. More information in the article <articleLink>"Sending Invoices"</articleLink>.
invoice.send.info.no-email: If you want to send the invoice by email, specify the buyer's email above.
invoice.gdrive.error.save: Error saving invoice to your Google Drive.
invoice.gdrive.error.delete: Error deleting invoice from Google Drive.
invoice.gdrive.note.uploaded: Note: this invoice has already been uploaded to Google Drive.
invoice.gdrive.button.save.tooltip.with-: If you want, you can save the invoice to Google Drive. The invoice will be saved to the "Haiku.lt/Income/{year}" directory.
invoice.gdrive.button.save.tooltip.no-ac: If you want, you can save the invoice to Google Drive. To do this, you need to log out of the haiku.lt system and log in again, granting haiku.lt permission to access your Google Drive during login.
invoice.gdrive.delete-modal.title: Delete invoice from Google Drive
invoice.gdrive.delete-modal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice from Google Drive? The invoice will remain in the system but will be removed from Google Drive.

invoice.edit.buyer-email.description.no-: If you want to send emails directly from haiku.lt, grant permission. You can do this by logging out and logging back in to haiku.lt
To send emails, configure your Email Provider in Settings
invoice.edit.buyer-email.description.wit: You can specify multiple email addresses. In that case, separate them with a comma.
invoice.edit.buyer-email.error.invalid: an email address must be entered here
invoice.edit.buyer-email.error.gmail-inv: Gmail addresses can only contain letters, numbers, periods (.) and plus signs (+). Characters like underscore (_) or hyphen (-) are not allowed.

invoice.checkbox.locked.error: An error occurred while locking/unlocking the invoice.
invoice.checkbox.paid.error: An error occurred while changing the payment status.
invoice.checkbox.sent.error: An error occurred while marking the invoice as sent/unsent.
invoice.checkbox.issued-tooltip: Issued invoices cannot be changed. A credit invoice must be created to void this one, and a new invoice issued if necessary.
invoice.edit.buyer-first-line.label: Buyer
invoice.buyer_registration_number_placeh: Company registration code, business ID, or individual activity certificate number
invoice.edit.buyer-details.title: Buyer details
invoice.edit.buyer-details.note: These details are used for e-invoicing and advanced tax purposes.
invoice.invoice_reference_placeholder: Enter the original invoice number this credit note refers to
invoice.edit.controls.pre-issued-warning: Locked and sent invoices are considered issued and cannot be edited anymore. Invoices sent using this system are automatically marked as issued (locked + sent). If you're not sure the invoice is final, consider using a proforma invoice instead — it is not a legal document and can be freely modified or deleted.
invoice.edit.controls.issued-warning: This invoice is issued (locked and sent) and cannot be edited or deleted. To cancel it, create a credit invoice. If you're not sure the invoice is final, consider using a proforma invoice instead — it is not a legal document and can be freely modified or deleted.

invoice.audit-modal.empty: No audit log entries for this invoice.
